titleStmt.title: SII 29.5: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 5. (A.R. No. 39 of 1961-62.) GAṄGĀPURAM, MAHABUBNAGAR TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Three sides of a slab by the side of Benakayya-guḍi in front of the Chennakēśava temple.

Top portion of the slab is broken and lost. This partially damaged record refers to the construction of a Jina-griha and the consecration of the image of Chenna Pārśvanātha there in by mahāvaḍḍa-vyavahāri maṇigāra Kāḷiseṭṭi of Tūbāḷa and to a gift of income from levies on commodities such as areca etc., for the worship and offerings to the Jina Pārśvanātha.

It refers to the Chālukya dynasty of whom Tailapa is mentioned and contains an eulogy of Nayakīrtidēva who was probably the recipient of the gift. There is a description of the city Gangāpuram where the Jina-griha was built. Also it mentions officers like sunkādhikāri and aḍḍasuṅkad-adhikāri.

Information regarding the date is partially lost as the top portion of the slab is broken and lost• The extant portion of it provides [Śrī]mukha, Phālguṇa śu • • Brihaspativāra, uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti. It is in characters of the 10th century A.D. [Tentatively the cyclic year Śrīmukha can be equated with Śaka 895 on the basis of only Tailapa being mentioned in the record].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
puṭṭi bhavya doḷindu
seṭṭi paramārthavaḍeda puṇameni (svaruci)
ya dānama nanavarataṁ naḍeyisidaṁ ḍida(mayiṁ) (du)
mādudu vismayamenesalu jinagrihamaṁ māḍisidaṁ (dana vidō)
(ḷte nū) kāḷiseṭṭi baḷḷaṁgoḷadoḷu . Āvibhuge kā cauladē
vi jagajjana vinūtanabhavita bhūpādadira (bhū)dēvabā
mādēvi tānenaludārate jinanāptaṁ nayakīrttidēva muni
paṁ rāddhānta cakrēśvaraṁ jinavaṁ tataṁ śrīkalidēvaśrēṣṭirāyaṁ
kīrtiyaṁkasiṁhaṁ śruta (talabhūpa) bhayavalu bhūsiradā
divriṁda nidānaṁ vibhu kāḷaseṭṭiya dhanyaṁ peṟardhanyarē . Eṁ
varṇisuttire jagaṁ puṭṭidanagaṇya puṇyavānuḷitavasurita gōtra (niṁ)
drananūḷvirata(nvaya) marjjunaṁganāḍudararāda
nutvaḷa (nudāri kāḷapaseṭṭi) gānaṁdade māḍisalke
bagedaṁ bhū daḍe divya bhōgā(rtha)
bhūvaḷeyadoḷu tā(ramaṁ) taḷaṁ (pā)usavirehi
māppsunghuhama nādi kaṇgoḷikukapa
ra nādhadindra(ri)ṁda sāḷōpa(rivā)jya tā lu tadadōrdda
ppuda sūna sau gō puraṁ saṁtataṁ . na(da)
dyōtkara paṁkajakararppa dirppā vāṭadi nudvā (nadi)
dgha saraḷīda nadō (vikṣitri)da (pi)nu naṁdabaka
ḷikaradaḷahāri nā dya tadanāgēṣvādavaḥ kṣē
tāmara puraṁ gaṁgāpuraṁ . dā(rā)ya(tkā)pududdaṇḍanārāma (śrī)
ramya harmya chāyādi divyāṁganā saṁpadinu (piḍi) samasta divasa(dā)
nīraṁgaḷiṁ dānamāvarggayānvēkādya (kāḷādivana) ryyadayve
kaḷiṁda paṁcēṟu(ha vakṣasa)ṁpadaṁ ṇimana ka
ddiṁ palakālada pratimāṇi yyādipadi habbada bā
ra latikādātraṁ caḷukyānvaya mābhyudaya nudāmaldā (ḻā)rā
drihara(hā)sa svarṇādhikāṟi saṁpadakīrtti pramadādi nārā
ḷuṁ puki(lā)lapaṁ tailapaṁ nitinudidarma(vaṁ mārakārege)
ṇi karṇṇaḷikalāvaṇa menisiddā vibhutalapradavaṁ janādrapattāre ja
nalliṁ baḷiya bāḷakuḷa muṁḍana ka (dvayaraṇa)
subrājana tākṣilōla naradayabhyudayā
varu madrā yū

nisida tapa
samanilla tamage
kāvyakaḷācatura caturmmukha
ntī kṣitiyoḷe nayakīrttidē
va munipaṁ negaḷda . Avarādiyā
ge sanmunivakāhāra dānamaṁ jinapaṁ
bōtsavamuṁ salenelontiralavā
ryya śauryyarparāṁganārati dū
rura vitaraṇanidigoḷu saraṇā
gatarakṣaṇa dakṣaranrita dūra
kritakalikāla kaḷaṁkakrita kri
tyarnnarapuli(lo)yiṁḍayā
rtvara . Idanintī kramadiṁ
pāḷisuveṁbarggehi kāva
tri kābhyudayaṁ niścaya
kku dijanuttidarmma
maṁ kaṁḍu kāydudurātma(kā)
disalu maneṁdare mahā
pāpakke pakkāgi bīḷadirapu
tra kaḷatra mitranivahānvi
ni goṁdāṁtadoḷu . śrī

mukhaṁ saṁvatsarada phālguṇa su
haspati vāradaṁduttarāyaṇa saṁ
(krā)nti nimimittavāgi śrīmanmahāvaḍḍavyava(hā)
ri tūbāḷa maṇigāṟa kāḷise
ṭṭiyaru pratiṣṭheya māḍida śrīmacenna
pārśvanātha dēvaraṁgabhōga nivēdya pūjā
punaskārakkācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ naḍe
vantāgi biṭṭaya Ettina Aḍakeya kēṟige Aḍake 20
Aḍakeya kōṇana kacce mādara Aḍake 20 kattoyva Aḍakeya (ka)
(vyaduḍake) Aḍa 10 Aḍakeya tale javaḷakke Aḍake 5 Etti
(ḷubha) kōṇana meḷasina hēṟiṁge kabbeguḍakevoḷa sāgi
da solage 1 kattiya meḷasina kabbegaḍakke Adaṟarddha
(me)ḷasina ravēja javaḷakke Aṁtadaṟarddha Ettina maḷavige
1 kattiya maḷave capasāli Alējavakke hāga
(sūradiṁ) jīrage Eleya (nā)ga meḷasinopādiyanū
rppatti gaṁḍesigaṁ talaṁdiyāgi suṁkadadhikārigaḷge
tiṁgaḷige paṇa 1 . Aḍḍa karmmada Adhikārigaḷu tiṁgaḷiṁge
haṇa 1 Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaru śrīvāraṇāsi
yalu sāvira kavileya sāvira brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa pha
lavakku kādharmma mēlādanpuke bājanaru Ā vāraṇāsiya
lu sāyira kavileyaṁ sāyira brāhmaṇarddaṁ (sā)la
mmaṁ (konda) pāpavaneyda ru .
Digital edition of SII 29.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
